title: haastia sinclairii
intro: Haastia sinclairii, also known as New Zealand pepperwort, is a perennial plant native to the coastal regions of New Zealand. This plant has been used in traditional Maori medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Haastia sinclairii include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate coughs and colds, and promote wound healing. Haastia sinclairii can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and has also been used in topical applications such as salves and creams.
